provenance_defaults.source: self-authored (general clinical pharmacology knowledge; mechanism-class only; corroborate against AMH/TGA at review). NOT derived from LITFL notes.

records.subject: amiodarone

records.mechanism_class: additive QT prolongation -> torsades de pointes

records.mechanism_class: additive negative chronotropy/dromotropy -> bradycardia, AV block, hypotension

records.mechanism_class: P-glycoprotein inhibition raises digoxin exposure

records.mechanism_class: CYP3A4 inhibition -> INR elevation

records.mechanism_class: CYP3A4 inhibition -> raised statin exposure -> rhabdomyolysis

records.mechanism_class: P-glycoprotein inhibition / gut flora change raises digoxin exposure

records.mechanism_class: CYP2C9 inhibition -> INR elevation

records.mechanism_class: disulfiram-like reaction (acetaldehyde accumulation)

records.subject: rifampicin

records.mechanism_class: additive serotonergic effect -> serotonin syndrome

records.mechanism_class: CYP2C9 inhibition + impaired platelet function -> bleeding / INR rise

records.mechanism_class: impaired platelet serotonin -> increased GI bleeding risk
